findings: No Majors or contradictions found against the plan or spec at base 2051ffe. One tangential documentation gap noted (docs/templates/repo-policy-check-patterns.md missing from setup.md's Ported-prior-art row) but left unfixed as out of this car's scope, disclosed in the 1.6 commit body instead. All three CI-leg failure branches (failing test, zero-test discovery, go vet failure) were fault-injected and watched to fire locally, then cleanly reverted, satisfying the watched-red requirement for task 1.4 without a code commit.
abstract: Car 1 completed yard-board plan tasks 1.1 through 1.6 on branch car/board-car1, base 2051ffe. Landed the board Go module (go 1.26, pinned santhosh-tekuri/jsonschema/v6 v6.0.2), a CI leg running go vet and go test across both matrix legs with a zero-test refusal guard, a red-first RE2 standing-rule probe over schema pattern fields, a locally watched red-green cycle across three fault classes for the CI leg logic, a vendored bare-ESM draft-2020-12 JS schema validator probe (cfworker/json-schema v4.1.1) proving no-build-step loading and validation of the wire schema, and setup.md updates covering the Go and Node toolchain dependencies plus a recorded re-park ruling on issues 3 and 4. Five commits landed (ce5c93f, a81b6d4, 591423e, f356c2d, 6152524); task 1.4 required no commit since it is a pure local verification act. Final state: Pester 178/178, go test 4/4, go vet clean, JS probe PASS, working tree clean.
